overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone gate into a bustling town square with half-timbered houses. The overcast atmosphere and detailed historic architecture create an immersive fantasy setting as the character moves from an enclosed passage into open urban spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone gate passage with guard posts

events.description: passing group of armored guards standing at attention along the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone gate passage, navigating between guards and wooden barricades

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red livery standing with halberd at the ready
guard leaning against the stone wall observing passersby

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway forming the main gate structure with heavy wooden portcullis visible above
rough-hewn stone wall with narrow windows forming the left side of the gate passage
fortified stone wall with moss and weathering on the right side
temporary wooden fence and debris blocking off part of the passage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view through a massive stone gate archway. The camera follows Geralt walking through a narrow cobblestone passage flanked by high stone walls. Armored guards in red stand at intervals along the walls, some holding halberds, creating a militarized atmosphere. The space is enclosed and sheltered, with only partial sky visible through the arch ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with half-timbered merchant houses

events.description: exits the enclosed stone gate into the open town square with half-timbered buildings visible
passing a formation of guards marching in formation across the square

agents.ego_description: walking through the open town square, navigating around groups of townspeople and patrolling guards

notable_agents.action: squad of four guards in red armor marching in formation with weapons shouldered
merchant in brown tunic walking with purpose toward the market stalls

entered.detail: distinctive medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls, multiple stories with overhanging upper floor
solid stone structure with small windows and a steep roof on the left side of the square
tall stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance beyond the square

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stone gate, the scene opens into a wide town square under an overcast sky. Half-timbered houses with distinctive wooden beam architecture line the right side, while stone buildings occupy the left. The cobblestone street continues through the square, populated by walking townspeople and a formation of guards marching across the path. The atmosphere shifts from confined and militarized to open and commercial.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square approaching large manor house with secondary gate

events.description: navigating around a wooden cart and horse hitched to the left side of the street
approaching a second stone archway leading to the large manor house ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the town square toward a large building ahead, passing merchants and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: draft horse hitched to a wooden cart loaded with goods
townsperson in dark clothing walking ahead toward the manor entrance

entered.detail: impressive multi-story building with red brick and stone facade, large arched entrance ahead
low wooden picket fence lining the right side of the cobblestone path
secondary stone archway forming the entrance to the manor courtyard

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a large manor house at the far end of the square. The half-timbered buildings recede into the right background as the camera moves toward a prominent stone archway entrance. A wooden cart with a hitched horse stands to the left, while wooden fences line the right side of the path. The cobblestone street shows patches of grass and wear, leading toward the manor's imposing red-brick facade and arched gateway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, militarized stone passage into a wide, bustling town square. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow cobblestone corridor flanked by high walls and armored guards holding halberds, where the view is restricted by a massive stone archway. As the camera emerges from the gate, the space opens into a broad square under an overcast sky, shifting the atmosphere from enclosure to an open commercial hub lined with half-timbered houses and marching guards. The scene then expands further as the camera moves past townspeople and a horse-drawn cart, with the wooden buildings receding into the background. Finally, the path leads across worn cobblestones and patches of grass toward the imposing red-brick facade and arched gateway of a large manor house.
